title: Resume Architecture, Evidence Statements, and Machine-Robust Delivery · Application Repair Board
summary: A realistic resume architecture, evidence statements, and machine-robust delivery artifact contains one plausible targeting, evidence, integrity, access, privacy, process, or decision defect. Locate the first unsupported claim before revising it. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in truthful role-targeted resume system and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, an…
objectives: Prioritize the candidate value proposition and strongest role-relevant evidence for a rapid human review.
Write concise action, context, decision, behavior, result, and evidence statements without false causality or invented metrics.
Translate projects, education, open source, community work, care, career change, and employment into relevant evidence without hiding provenance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Resume Priority
steps.instruction:
debug case — A two-column resume contains vague adjectives, hidden text, inconsistent dates, unsupported percentages, broken links, and a PDF with scrambled extraction order. The debug variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Prioritize the candidate value proposition and strongest role-relevant evidence for a rapid human review.

Inspect the Resume Priority trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Resume Priority.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for prioritize the candidate value proposition and strongest role-relevant evidence for a rapid human review. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Resume Priority, keep Resume Priority connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: For Resume Priority, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Resume Priority, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Resume Priority precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Resume Priority, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A two-column resume contains vague adjectives, hidden text, inconsistent dates, unsupported percentages, broken links, and a PDF with scrambled extraction order. The debug variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Prioritize the candidate value proposition and strongest role-relevant evidence for a rapid human review.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Resume Priority, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: A resume must preserve the full chronology with equal detail.

stimulus.title: Resume Priority case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A two-column resume contains vague adjectives, hidden text, inconsistent dates, unsupported percentages, broken links, and a PDF with scrambled extraction order. The debug variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Prioritize the candidate value proposition and strongest role-relevant evidence for a rapid human review.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A resume must preserve the full chronology with equal detail.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Prioritize the candidate value proposition and strongest role-relevant evidence for a rapid human review. Artifact under review: truthful role-targeted resume system.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Resume Priority, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Resume Priority record says truthful role-targeted resume system looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect the failure record evidence boundary for Resume Priority.

For inspect the failure record, apply Resume Priority without its stated preconditions, omit the truthful role-targeted resume system trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Resume Priority for truthful role-targeted resume system.
